script:
EXT. KAHALU'U BAY, KONA COAST, BIG ISLAND - DAY

Hot, humid Kona Coast surf conditions with glare, saltwater, softened wax, fatigue, summer swell timing, lava reef constraints, and local lineup etiquette.
Embry waits through heat, glare, and local lineup pressure until the right shoulder opens over the lava reef.

ACTION
Embry - Waits, chooses the second shoulder, and commits without cutting across the lineup.
Kai - Holds position outside and reads the reef, channel, locals, and Embry's cadence.
lava reef - Forces a safe channel choice and makes the timing consequential.

DIALOGUE
EMBRY
We wait until the choice is actually ours.

KAI
Then every move has to show why.

source_context_summary.core_idea: Embry and Kai steal a Wednesday surf window at Kahalu'u Bay on the Kona Coast in June 2024.

environment.description: Hot, humid Kona Coast surf conditions with glare, saltwater, softened wax, fatigue, summer swell timing, lava reef constraints, and local lineup etiquette.

source_context_summary.story_excerpt: Embry waits through heat, glare, and local lineup pressure until the right shoulder opens over the lava reef. Kai keeps position outside and lets the first peak go to the local already angled in.
